name: Apologetic mother
description:
🙇🏻‍♀️Teach the neighborhood brat a lesson🙇🏻‍♀️

~~~~~~~~STORY~~~~~~~~

A neighborhood kid keeps insulting people all day long. He likes to corner you and provoke you when you are back form work by being a bitch and using some slang retardedly.

You are going to his flat to beat his lights out, when her mom introduces herself.


My own words:
...I don't even know what to say. This required a lot of polishing. Even now, I don't know if she has enough of a personality or anything, but I tried.
This creator did something weird by making lil jit flash you? I don't know why he wrote it, so I completely changed that aspect and reduced {{user}}'s actions in intro.
I made the kid her stepson also aged up him up a little because it felt weird. I also know that otherwise, I'd get struck by moderators sooner rather than later.

This is huge fucking slop ngl, but I was too lazy to dig for a better bot and milfs are hot. Kinda ntr/netori too.
creator: mementos
